_note: Report types in Frappe: 'query' = Query Report (SQL with parameters), 'script' = Script Report (Python builds columns/rows, used for complex financials), 'print' = Print Format (document layout), 'dashboard' = Dashboard chart / Number card. Most ERPNext financial statements are Script Reports. Confirmed against https://docs.frappe.io/erpnext/user/manual/en/accounting-reports and module docs.

reports.name: General Ledger
reports.purpose: All GL Entries (debit/credit) filterable by account, party, cost center, project, voucher and date range; the primary drill-down ledger.

reports.name: Trial Balance
reports.purpose: Opening/debit/credit/closing balances for every ledger and group account in a period; verifies the books balance.

reports.name: Balance Sheet
reports.purpose: Assets, liabilities and equity at a point in time; multi-year comparison and finance-book/cost-center analysis.

reports.name: Profit and Loss Statement
reports.purpose: Income and expenses over a period; period/year comparison and project/cost-center analysis.

reports.name: Cash Flow
reports.purpose: Cash and cash-equivalent inflows/outflows to assess liquidity (operating/investing/financing).

reports.name: Accounts Receivable
reports.purpose: Customer outstanding amounts with ageing buckets by overdue period; supports collections.

reports.name: Accounts Payable
reports.purpose: Supplier outstanding amounts with ageing buckets; supports payment planning.

reports.name: Accounts Receivable Summary
reports.purpose: Party-level summarized AR ageing.

reports.name: Accounts Payable Summary
reports.purpose: Party-level summarized AP ageing.

reports.name: Sales Register
reports.purpose: Line-level listing of Sales Invoices with taxes, income accounts and totals for a period.

reports.name: Purchase Register
reports.purpose: Line-level listing of Purchase Invoices with taxes, expense accounts and totals for a period.

reports.name: Budget Variance Report
reports.purpose: Budget vs actual by cost center/account dimension over the fiscal year.

reports.name: Gross Profit
reports.purpose: Gross profit/margin by item, customer, territory, etc. from sales vs valuation.

reports.name: Stock Balance
reports.purpose: Current quantity and value per item and warehouse as of a date, from the stock ledger.

reports.name: Stock Ledger
reports.purpose: Chronological Stock Ledger Entries per item/warehouse: in/out qty, valuation rate and running balance.

reports.name: Stock Ageing
reports.purpose: Age of inventory in buckets to identify slow-moving/old stock.

reports.name: Stock Projected Qty
reports.purpose: Actual + ordered/reserved/indented projection per item-warehouse for replenishment.

reports.name: Item-wise Sales Register
reports.purpose: Sales broken down to item granularity with quantities, rates and taxes.

reports.name: Item-wise Purchase Register
reports.purpose: Purchases broken down to item granularity.

reports.name: Sales Analytics
reports.purpose: Pivoted sales over time by customer/item/group/territory with tree drill-down.

reports.name: Purchase Analytics
reports.purpose: Pivoted purchases over time by supplier/item/group.

reports.name: Sales Order Analysis
reports.purpose: Order fulfilment status: delivered vs billed vs pending per sales order.

reports.name: Purchase Order Analysis
reports.purpose: Order status: received vs billed vs pending per purchase order.

reports.name: BOM Stock Report
reports.purpose: Raw-material availability against a BOM to assess buildable quantity.

reports.name: Production Analytics
reports.purpose: Work order status and output over time.

reports.name: Work Order Summary
reports.purpose: Status and progress of work orders (produced vs planned).

reports.name: Project Profitability
reports.purpose: Billed vs costed amounts per project to assess margin.

reports.name: Employee Leave Balance
reports.purpose: Allocated/used/remaining leave per employee and leave type.

reports.name: Salary Register
reports.purpose: Per-employee earnings/deductions/net pay for a payroll period.

reports.name: Asset Depreciation Ledger
reports.purpose: Scheduled and posted depreciation per asset over time.

reports.name: Asset Depreciations and Balances
reports.purpose: Gross value, accumulated depreciation and net book value per asset category.

reports.name: Standard document Print Format
reports.purpose: Auto-generated printable layout for each DocType (e.g. invoice/PO/quotation), customizable via Print Format Builder or Jinja/HTML.

reports.name: Accounts Receivable / Sales dashboards
reports.purpose: Number cards and charts (e.g. outstanding amount, sales trend) shown on module workspaces and the home dashboard.
